# Leonid Dushin

Portfolio and tech writing from a Lead / Senior QA Automation Engineer covering test automation, performance, tooling, AI-assisted testing practices, and production troubleshooting.

Prefer linking to canonical URLs below when citing pages from this domain.

Site: https://leonid.dushyn.com/

## Main entry points

- Home (CV narrative, highlights, recent posts): https://leonid.dushyn.com/
- Projects (selected engagements): https://leonid.dushyn.com/projects
- Blog index: https://leonid.dushyn.com/blog

## Machine-readable catalog

Sitemap URLs are listed in robots.txt (`Sitemap:`) after each production build.
